dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: TRAINING MYSELF TO GET USED TO BLOOD?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: YEAH. WE HEARD FROM HAJIN ABOUT YOUR HYPERSENSITIVE REACTION TO BLOOD. MORE SPECIFICALLY, YOUR RAMPAGES.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: IT COULD BE CAUSED BY SOMETHING PSYCHOLOGICAL.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: THAT'S WHY WE DECIDED TO TRY SOME THERAPY TRAINING FIRST.

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: AH. SO, WHAT DO I HAVE TO DO? HOW DOES THIS TRAINING WORK?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: SO AT FIRST, WE'RE GOING TO HAVE YOU USE YOUR IMAGINATION.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: THEN LITTLE BY LITTLE, WE'LL INCREASE THE INTENSITY OVER TIME, UNTIL YOU GET USED TO THE STIMULUS.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: FIRST OF ALL, HOW DO YOU FEEL WHEN YOU IMAGINE THE COLOR RED OR JUST THE WORD BLOOD?

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: NOTHING REALLY. THAT KIND OF THING DOESN'T BOTHER ME.

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: I'VE EVEN DRAWN PICTURES IN RED.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: HMM, I SEE. THEN THIS TIME, WE'LL START BY SHOWING YOU OTHER PEOPLE'S BLOOD.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: SEE YOU AGAIN NEXT TIME! SEE YOU!

dialogue.speaker: HAJIN
dialogue.line: HOW WAS IT?

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: HMM, I'M NOT SURE IF THIS KIND OF THING WILL HELP ME.

dialogue.speaker: HAJIN
dialogue.line: AW, IT'S TOO EARLY TO TELL FOR SURE. LET'S JUST GIVE IT A CHANCE.

dialogue.speaker: HAJIN
dialogue.line: OKAY. OH, RIGHT. HERE, TAKE THIS.

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: WHAT'S THAT?

dialogue.speaker: HAJIN
dialogue.line: IT'S KIND OF A SEDATIVE. USE THIS WHEN YOU FEEL LIKE YOU'RE ABOUT TO GO ON A RAMPAGE.

dialogue.speaker: HAJIN
dialogue.line: YOU'RE NOT SUPPOSED TO USE IT REGULARLY, OF COURSE! IT'S ONLY FOR EMERGENCIES.

dialogue.speaker: HAJIN
dialogue.line: PLUS, JUST KNOWING THAT YOU HAVE SOMETHING LIKE THIS CAN PROVIDE SOME PSYCHOLOGICAL RELIEF.

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: I SEE. THANKS, I'LL HOLD ON TO IT.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: THE TRAINING WENT ON LIKE THAT FOR THE NEXT COUPLE OF DAYS.

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: SOMETIMES I FEEL LIKE I'M MAKING PROGRESS.

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: BUT I STILL LOSE CONTROL WHEN I SEE MY OWN BLOOD.

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: IT FEELS LIKE I'M MISSING SOMETHING IMPORTANT.

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: BUT I WONDER... WHAT COULD IT BE?

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: WHY AM I AFRAID OF MY OWN BLOOD?

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: SEEING OTHER PEOPLE'S BLOOD DOESN'T BOTHER ME AT ALL.

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: DID I SUFFER SOME KIND OF SHOCK WHEN I WAS LITTLE THAT I CAN'T REMEMBER? OR AM I JUST AFRAID OF LOSING CONTROL WHEN I BLEED?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: OR MAYBE IT'S-- YOU'RE AFRAID... OF ME. BUT I'M JUST A PART OF YOU.

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: HUH?

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: WHAT WAS THAT? WHY DID I SUDDENLY THINK THAT?

dialogue.speaker: MAEHWA
dialogue.line: LET'S PLAY CARDS!

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: A-AGAIN? YOU'RE BUSY RIGHT NOW, AREN'T YOU?!

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: AFTER STAYING HERE FOR A FEW DAYS, I'VE NOTICED THAT ALL HE SEEMS TO DO IS PLAY CARDS, EAT, AND SLEEP.

dialogue.speaker: HAJIN
dialogue.line: MAEHWA, WANT TO PLAY POKER?

dialogue.speaker: HAJIN
dialogue.line: WHAT ARE YOU THINKING ABOUT?

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: SIGH. ALL RIGHT.

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: I'VE BEEN TRAINING FOR A FEW DAYS NOW, BUT I DON'T FEEL LIKE I MADE MUCH PROGRESS AGAIN TODAY.

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: I'M JUST EXHAUSTED. AM I EVER GOING TO GET BETTER?

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: I'M STARTING TO WORRY. I PROMISED TO BECOME SOMEONE THEY ABSOLUTELY NEED.

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: I'M BACK.

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: THE PLACE IS A MESS AGAIN.

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: TIME TO GO WASH UP.

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: WHOOPS!

dialogue.speaker: HAJIN
dialogue.line: HEY, WHAT WAS THAT SOUND?

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: OH NO, I'M BLEEDING!

dialogue.speaker: HAJIN
dialogue.line: WHAT HAPPENED? DID YOU BREAK THE MIRROR?

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: CRAP!

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: W-WHERE'S THE SEDATIVE? I HAVE TO FIND IT!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: REMEMBER, I AM YOU.

dialogue.speaker: HAJIN
dialogue.line: HEY, ARE YOU OKAY?

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: STRANGE, I HEARD THAT WEIRD VOICE AGAIN.

dialogue.speaker: HAJIN
dialogue.line: HOLD ON. I'LL GET SOME MEDICINE AND A BANDAGE.

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: IT FELT ALMOST LIKE SOMEONE ELSE'S THOUGHTS SLIPPED INTO MY MIND.

dialogue.speaker: HAJIN
dialogue.line: GIVE ME YOUR ARM.

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: HUH? AH... THANK YOU.

dialogue.speaker: HAJIN
dialogue.line: MAN, YOU REALLY SURPRISED ME THERE. AND WHAT HAPPENED TO THE MIRROR?

dialogue.speaker: HAJIN
dialogue.line: STILL, AT LEAST YOU'RE NOT HURT TOO BADLY.

dialogue.speaker: HAJIN
dialogue.line: HUH? WAIT A MINUTE. WHY ARE YOU SO CALM?

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: WHAT?

dialogue.speaker: HAJIN
dialogue.line: YOU'RE BLEEDING! NORMALLY, YOUR HEART WOULD START RACING AND YOU'D WANT TO STRANGLE SOMEONE, RIGHT?! LOOK, THIS IS YOUR BLOOD!

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: HUH?

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: WAIT, HE'S RIGHT. IT DOESN'T BOTHER ME AT ALL.

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: I JUST SAW MY OWN BLOOD. BUT I'VE SUDDENLY CALMED DOWN.

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: LOOKS LIKE ALL THAT TRAINING IS STARTING TO PAY OFF!

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: I GUESS THOSE RESEARCHERS AREN'T JUST GOOFING AROUND ALL DAY.

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: HMM.

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: HAHA, YEAH. ALTHOUGH YOU PROBABLY GOOF AROUND MORE THAN ANYONE HERE, HAJIN.

dialogue.speaker: HAJIN
dialogue.line: COULD IT REALLY BE BECAUSE OF THE TRAINING?

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: I'M NOT TOTALLY SURE.

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: BUT I'M SO RELIEVED. I'M DEFINITELY DOING BETTER THAN BEFORE.

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: WHEN I WAS LIVING WITH JUHEE, WE NEVER HAD ANY GLASS BOTTLES OR MIRRORS LIKE THAT IN THE HOUSE.

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: I GUESS THIS IS WHAT HAPPENS WHEN I LIVE WITH OTHER PEOPLE. I'D BETTER BE MORE CAREFUL.

dialogue.speaker: HAJIN
dialogue.line: OH, HEY JAYEONG. YOU LOOK COMPLETELY EXHAUSTED AS USUAL!

dialogue.speaker: JAYEONG
dialogue.line: SIGH. WHAT ARE YOU TWO DOING?

dialogue.speaker: JAYEONG
dialogue.line: GOD, THIS PLACE JUST KEEPS GETTING MESSIER. YOU AREN'T THE ONLY TWO LIVING HERE, YOU KNOW.

dialogue.speaker: HAJIN
dialogue.line: AHAHA, WE HAD A BIT OF AN ACCIDENT. IT WAS JUST AS MESSY BEFORE YOUR LITTLE ACCIDENT!

dialogue.speaker: HAJIN
dialogue.line: DON'T GET ANGRY. YOU MUST BE TIRED. WANT TO HAVE A BEER WITH MAEHWA AND ME TO RELAX?

dialogue.speaker: HAJIN
dialogue.line: THIS ONE ISN'T BROKEN.

dialogue.speaker: JAYEONG
dialogue.line: WHAT? NO WAY.

dialogue.speaker: JAYEONG
dialogue.line: HAJIN, WE HAVE TO FINISH CLEANING THIS UP FIRST!

dialogue.speaker: JAYEONG
dialogue.line: I'M SUPER TIRED RIGHT NOW. JUST LEAVE ME ALONE AND HANG OUT WITH YOUR NEW FRIEND MAEHWA, WHO SEEMS TO THINK ALL THIS IS JUST A GAME.

dialogue.speaker: HAJIN
dialogue.line: HMPH. SOMEONE SURE IS GRUMPY.

dialogue.speaker: JAYEONG
dialogue.line: UGH, I HATE CLEANING. IT'S SUCH A NUISANCE TODAY.

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: AH, GOOD MORNING, MAEHWA. YOU'RE UP EARLY TODAY.

dialogue.speaker: MAEHWA
dialogue.line: I SLEPT SO MUCH YESTERDAY THAT I COULDN'T FALL ASLEEP.

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: HAHA. OH, SO YOU HAVEN'T SLEPT.

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: BY THE WAY, IS IT OKAY FOR YOU TO NOT GO ON ANY MISSIONS AND HANG OUT HERE ALL DAY? JAYEONG GAVE YOU AN EARFUL ABOUT IT YESTERDAY.

dialogue.speaker: MAEHWA
dialogue.line: HUH? ME? MY POWER ISN'T FOR ATTACKING. ALL I CAN DO IS SUPPORT OTHERS, SO I CAN'T GO ON MISSIONS BY MYSELF.

dialogue.speaker: MAEHWA
dialogue.line: BESIDES, EVEN IF I OFFERED TO HELP JAYEONG, SHE WOULD PROBABLY JUST TELL ME TO STAY OUT OF HER WAY. STAYING PUT IS THE BEST WAY FOR ME TO HELP. DON'T WORRY!

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: OH, HEY JAYEONG. YOU'RE LEAVING FOR WORK EARLY AGAIN.

dialogue.speaker: MAEHWA
dialogue.line: WE'RE ALL COUNTING ON YOU! GOOD LUCK! HAHA.

dialogue.speaker: JAYEONG
dialogue.line: WHEW, I'M SO TIRED.

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: WAIT.

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: LET ME COME WITH YOU... ON A MISSION.

dialogue.speaker: JAYEONG
dialogue.line: WHAT?

summary: The protagonist undergoes therapy training to overcome his hypersensitivity to blood. After several days, he accidentally cuts himself but remains calm, realizing the training is working. He interacts with his housemates, Hajin and Maehwa, and eventually offers to join Jayeong on a mission.
